---
title: Project management in GitHub
author: Chris beeley
date: 2026-04-09
date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, ../su_presentation.scss]
    transition: none
    chalkboard:
      buttons: false
    preview-links: auto
    slide-number: false
    auto-animate: true
    footer: |
      view slides at [the-strategy-unit.github.io/data_science/presentations][ds_presentations]
---

## Intro
